name: Fried Green Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tomatoes into 1/2-inch slices.
2. Sprinkle both sides of each slice with salt and pepper.
3. Dip the slices first into milk, then into flour.
4. Next, dip the slices into eggs, followed by bread crumbs.
5. Heat a 10-inch skillet with enough oil over medium heat.
6. Cook the tomato slices in batches, adding more oil if necessary.
7. Fry each side for 8 to 10 minutes or until browned.
8. If the tomatoes brown too quickly, reduce the heat to medium-low.
9. Season with salt and pepper before serving.
10. Makes 6 servings.
